title: Antigen-binding proteins targeting coronavirus (cov) variants
abstract: Provided are anti-binding proteins that can bind to CoV (e.g., SARS-CoV-2) variants. For example, one or more embodiments described herein can comprise an antigen-binding protein that can comprise a heavy chain variable region with an amino acid sequence that is a variant of SEQ ID NO:7. The amino acid sequence can comprise at least one amino acid substitution selected from the group consisting of : R50D, R50E, R50W, R50F, R50Y, R50L, R50V, R50I, R50Pho, I54D, I54E, I54F, I54Y, I54Pho, L55D, L55E, L55W, L55F, L55Y, and L55Pho.
claims:
Claims 1. An antigen-binding protein, comprising: a heavy polypeptide chain variable region with an amino acid sequence that is a variant of SEQ ID NO: 7, wherein the amino acid sequence comprises at least one amino acid substitution selected from the group consisting of: R50D, R50E, R50W, R50F, R50Y, R50Pho, R50L, R50V, R50I, I54D, I54E, I54W, I54F, I54Y, I54Pho, L55D, L55E, L55W, L55F, L55Y, and L55Pho. 2. The antigen-binding protein of claim 1, wherein the amino acid sequence has at least 50% sequence identity with SEQ ID NO: 7. 3. The antigen-binding protein of claim 1 or 2, further comprising: a light polypeptide chain variable region with a second amino acid sequence that is a variant of SEQ ID NO: 8, wherein the second amino acid sequence comprises another amino acid substitution selected from the group consisting of: R96D, R96E, R96W, R96F, R96Y, R96L, R96V, R96I, and R96Pho. 4. The antigen-binding protein of claim 3, wherein the amino acid sequence has at least 50% sequence identity with SEQ ID NO: 10, and wherein the second amino acid sequence has least 50% sequence identity with SEQ ID NO: 18. 5. The antigen-binding protein of claim 1, wherein the amino acid sequence has at least 50% sequence identity with a member selected from the group consisting of: SEQ ID NO: 9, SEQ ID NO: 10, SEQ ID NO: 11, SEQ ID NO: 12, SEQ ID NO: 13, SEQ ID NO: 14, SEQ ID NO: 15, SEQ ID NO: 16, SEQ ID NO: 25, SEQ ID NO: 26, SEQ ID NO: 27, SEQ ID NO: 28, SEQ ID NO: 29, SEQ ID NO: 30, SEQ ID NO: 31, SEQ ID NO: 32, SEQ ID NO: 33, and SEQ ID NO: 34. 6. An antigen-binding protein, comprising: a light polypeptide chain variable region with an amino acid sequence that is a variant of SEQ ID NO: 8, wherein the amino acid sequence comprises an amino acid substitution selected from the group consisting of: R96D, R96E, R96W, R96F, R96Y, R96L, R96V, R96I, and R96Pho. 7. The antigen-binding protein of claim 6, wherein the amino acid sequence has at least 50% sequence identity with SEQ ID NO: 8. 8. The antigen-binding protein of claim 6 or 7, further comprising: a heavy polypeptide chain variable region with a second amino acid sequence that is a variant of SEQ ID NO: 7, wherein the second amino acid sequence comprises at least one other amino acid substitution selected from the group consisting of: R50D, R50E, R50W, R50F, R50Y, R50L, R50V, R50I, R50Pho, I54D, I54E, I54W, I54F, I54Y, I54Pho, L55D, L55E, L55W, L55F, L55Pho, and L55Y. 9. The antigen-binding protein of claim 7, wherein the amino acid sequence has at least 50% sequence identity with SEQ ID NO: 10, and wherein the second amino acid sequence has least 50% sequence identity with SEQ ID NO: 19. 10. The antigen-binding protein of claim 6, wherein the amino acid sequence has at least 50% sequence identity with a member selected from the group consisting of: SEQ ID NO: 17, SEQ ID NO: 18, SEQ ID NO: 19, SEQ ID NO: 20, SEQ ID NO: 21, SEQ ID NO: 22, SEQ ID NO: 23, and SEQ ID NO: 24. 11. An antigen-binding protein, comprising: a heavy polypeptide chain variable region with an amino acid sequence that is a variant of SEQ ID NO: 7, wherein the amino acid sequence comprises an amino acid substitution that substitutes at least one amino acid selected from the group consisting of R50, 154, and L55 with a negatively charged amino acid. 12. The antigen-binding protein of claim 11, wherein the amino acid sequence has at least 50% sequence identity with SEQ ID NO: 7. 13. The antigen-binding protein of claim 11 or 12, wherein the amino acid substitution is selected from the group consisting of: R50D, R50E, I54D, I54Pho, I54E, L55D, and L55E. 14. The antigen-binding protein of claim 12, further comprising: a light polypeptide chain variable region with a second amino acid sequence that is a variant of SEQ ID NO: 8, wherein the second amino acid sequence comprises a second amino acid substitution that substitutes the R96 amino acid with a second negatively charged amino acid. 15. The antigen-binding protein of claim 14, wherein the second amino acid substitution is selected from the group consisting of R96D and R96E. 16. An antigen-binding protein, comprising: a heavy polypeptide chain variable region with an amino acid sequence that is a variant of SEQ ID NO: 7, wherein the amino acid sequence comprises an amino acid substitution that substitutes at least one amino acid selected from the group consisting of R50, 154, and L55 with a hydrophobic residue. 17. The antigen-binding protein of claim 16, wherein the amino acid sequence has at least 50% sequence identity with SEQ ID NO: 7. 18. The antigen-binding protein of claim 16 or 17, wherein the amino acid substitution is selected from the group consisting of: R50L, R50V, R50I,R50F, R50W, I54W, I54F, L55W, and L55F. 19. The antigen-binding protein of one of claims 16 to 18, further comprising: a light polypeptide chain variable region with a second amino acid sequence that is a variant of SEQ ID NO: 8, wherein the second amino acid sequence comprises a second amino acid substitution that substitutes the R96 amino acid with a second hydrophobic residue. 20. The antigen-binding protein of claim 19, wherein the second amino acid substitution is selected from the group consisting of R96L, R96V, and R96I. 21. An antigen-binding protein, comprising: a heavy polypeptide chain variable region with an amino acid sequence that is a variant of SEQ ID NO: 7, wherein the amino acid sequence comprises an amino acid 

substitution that substitutes at least one amino acid selected from the group consisting of R50, 154, and L55 with an amino acid that forms a cation-7t interaction with a receptor binding domain of a SARS-CoV-2 spike protein. 22. The antigen-binding protein of claim 21, wherein the amino acid sequence has at least 50% sequence identity with SEQ ID NO: 7. 23. The antigen-binding protein of claim 21 or 22, wherein the amino acid substitution is selected from the group consisting of: R50W, R50F, R50Y, I54W, I54F, I54Y, L55W, L55F, and L55Y. 24. The antigen-binding protein of one of claims 21 to 23, further comprising: a light polypeptide chain variable region with a second amino acid sequence that is a variant of SEQ ID NO: 8, wherein the second amino acid sequence comprises a second amino acid substitution that substitutes the R96 amino acid with another amino acid that forms the cation-7t interaction with the receptor binding domain of the SARS-CoV-2 spike protein. 25. The antigen-binding protein of claim 24, wherein the second amino acid substitution is selected from the group consisting of R96W, R96F, and R96Y. 22
